title: gnome-shell bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[47.8-6]
- Add missing require

[47.8-5]
- Revert basing input method indicator length on graphemes

[47.8-4]
- Allow restart/shutdown on lock screen

[47.8-3]
- Bump release to force rebuild

[47.8-2]
- Add screenshot CLI tool

[47.8-1]
- Update to 47.8

[47.7-1]
- Update to 47.7

[47.6-1]
- Update to 47.6

[47.5-1]
- Update to 47.5
